sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104324" key="tocoxi/twn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τοξο-χίτων</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n104324.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">equipped with bow and arrows,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:123" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">123</biblScope> </bibl> (dub. l.).</sense> </entryFree>
